data.body: #ConlangApril 13 - Tëilachelst is VSO in the day-to-day and most speech and writing, but cases are inflected so VOS is also accepted. Technically I think other orders work as well because of how case is expressed, but no one would talk like that without deliberately trying to be obtuse.

data.body: $40M for on-device AI security is betting CrowdStrike's centralized model is the wrong architecture.
